data.title: U.S. FDA Grants Breakthrough Device Designation to Laguna Diagnostics' mRNA Gene Biomarker Test to Aid in Differentiation of Schizophrenia and Bipolar I Disorder
data.description: Laguna Diagnostics, LLC based in Irvine, California reported on April 28, 2026 that their mRNA Gene Biomarker Test has been granted Breakthrough Device Designation by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. This test is blood-based and aims to assist in distinguishing between different conditions. The designation signifies that the FDA recognizes the potential of this novel test to provide significant advantages for healthcare.
HUNGARY LEAVES BASE RATE AT 6.25%; EST. 6.25%

data.title: Sleep Number Announces Amendment to Credit Agreement
data.description: In Minneapolis, Sleep Number (Nasdaq: SNBR) has confirmed an agreement with lenders for increased liquidity. This deal includes a $25 million term loan, total additional liquidity amounting to $55 million, and offers relaxation on specific financial and liquidity covenants. This development facilitates the company’s execution of its turnaround strategy, encompassing product enhancements and marketing endeavors. It also supports ongoing assessments of potential strategic business moves and financing options to provide optimal value.

data.title: BBSI Introduces New HRIS Module: Performance Management
data.description: Barrett Business Services, Inc. (BBSI), a prominent provider of business management solutions and one of the largest professional employer organizations in the U.S., revealed their plan to introduce a new Performance Management module on the myBBSI Client Portal. This new HRIS offering aims to assist organizations in synchronizing objectives and expectations with employees while ensuring consistent and transparent tracking and assessment of employee performance. The announcement was made on April 28, 2026, by the Vancouver-based company, listed as BBSI on the NASDAQ stock exchange.

data.title: electroCore to Present at the Market Movers Investor Summit on May 5, 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, electroCore, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECOR), a bioelectronic medicine and wellness company based in Rockaway, New Jersey, revealed its involvement in the Market Movers Investor Summit at the Bank of New York. Joshua Lev, Interim President and CFO, is expected to give a presentation and engage in individual meetings during the event.

data.title: Bojangles Debuts Famous Carolina Flavor with First Oklahoma Restaurant
data.description: Bojangles, known for its famous chicken, biscuits, and tea, has made its debut in Oklahoma City. The new restaurant, situated at 13135 North Pennsylvania Avenue, opened to the public at 5:00 a.m. today. This location adds to Bojangles' expanding presence, boasting Carolina-themed decor that showcases the brand's heritage. Every aspect, from visuals to ambiance, is crafted to bring the "Carolina Legend" to life.

data.title: Provident Bank Expands ABL Team with the Addition of Bruce Gibson as First Vice President, Senior Relationship Manager
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Provident Bank of New Jersey welcomed Bruce Gibson as its new First Vice President and Senior Relationship Manager for the Asset-Based Lending (ABL) team. Gibson’s responsibilities include overseeing complex asset-based lending relationships, structuring deals, and managing portfolios in the Northeast region. In his new role, he will focus on driving business growth and providing support to clients. This move highlights Provident Bank’s commitment to expanding its financial services under Gibson’s leadership.

data.title: Quay Partners With Klarna to Make Eyewear More Accessible With Flexible Payments
data.description: In New York, Klarna, a prominent digital bank and payments provider, has revealed a fresh collaboration with Quay, a top eyewear brand worldwide. This partnership introduces Klarna's various flexible payment choices to Quay's website and all 24 stores in the United States. Consumers now have the option to select from Klarna's complete range of payment options, encompassing paying in full, paying within 30 days, dividing payments into four interest-free installments, or opting for extended financing plans. This partnership emerges as Quay advances its optical services expansion.

data.title: Novo Nordisk to present new data on Wegovy®, women with obesity and next-generation weight loss treatments at European Congress on Obesity
data.description: Novo Nordisk is scheduled to showcase fresh clinical data and real-world evidence during the European Congress on Obesity in Istanbul, Turkey from May 12th to May 15th.

data.title: Logility Sets New AI Standard With Orchestration Center for Supply Chain Leaders
data.description: Alpharetta, Georgia - Logility, a leading supply chain management software company, has introduced Orchestration Center, a real-time agentic AI technology that goes beyond providing insights to taking action. This innovative platform integrates various aspects of the supply chain such as planning, production, supplier management, and transportation management onto a single Agentic AI layer. With Orchestration Center, customers can efficiently plan, sense market changes, adapt strategies, and execute decisions within minutes. This advancement marks a significant development in supply chain management technology.

data.title: AI Roleplay to Enhance Practice+, NovoEd's Signature Skill-Building Learning Experience
data.description: A leading enterprise talent development technology provider, NovoEd, based in San Francisco, announced on April 28, 2026, that they are leveraging AI to enhance practice, feedback, and measurement processes. This innovation allows enterprise organizations to shift from focusing solely on content delivery to ensuring true performance readiness. NovoEd's advanced technology aims to enable organizations to effectively develop their talents.

data.title: Syra Health Wins Innovation of the Year and BioCrossroads Life Sciences Innovation Award at the 2026 TechPoint Mira Awards
data.description: Syra Health, based in Carmel, Indiana, was recently awarded the state's top accolades for advancements in technology and innovation, particularly in the fields of behavioral and population health. The company, known as Syra Health Corp. and trading publicly under the ticker symbol SYRA on OTCQB, has been recognized for its transformative healthcare solutions.

data.title: New shares of Bioretec Ltd registered with the trade register
data.description: Company Bioretec Ltd made an announcement on April 28, 2026, at 13:10 EEST, specifying that the information should not be distributed or released in Australia, Canada, the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region of the People's Republic of China, Japan, New Zealand, etc.
The exchange of two for two took place at the Belarusian-Polish border, according to the FSB. Russian scientist Butyagin was exchanged for two officers of the Moldovan special services.

Poland, as part of an exchange with Belarus, has released Russian historian Butyagin, who was due to be extradited to Ukraine, announced Sikorski.

data.title: Commvault Announces Fourth Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Commvault, a company based in Tinton Falls, N.J., announced that it successfully met all fourth-quarter and fiscal 2026 performance metrics. Notably, they achieved a record $132 million in free cash flow during the fourth quarter. The total reported Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) saw a 21% year-over-year growth, including $44 million in net new ARR when adjusted for currency fluctuations. This achievement signifies strong financial performance by Commvault.

data.title: Hope Bancorp Reports Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
data.description: In Los Angeles, Hope Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOPE) announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The Company, which is the parent company of Bank of Hope, reported a net income of $29.5 million, equivalent to $0.23 per diluted common share. This marked a 40% increase from the previous year's net income of $21.1 million, or $0.17 per diluted common share for the same period. However, there was a 14% decrease from the preceding quarter's earnings.
